fight.message1: Ah, Dinoville, the jewel of Dinoland, the starting point of every adventure worth the name.
fight.message2: After a long journey, you have finally arrived at your destination, drawn by rumors of thrilling adventures, riches, and glory.
fight.message3: This is where you will be able to recruit your first companion and...
fight.message5: Hey you! Ready to join the adventure?

footer.info: This game is a fan project for DinoRPG by {motionTwin}.{br}Unless stated otherwise, all graphical assets are taken from these games and therefore remain the property of Motion Twin. DinoRPG is Open Source and everyone is welcome to contribute. You can view the source code on {github}.
